main.description: A document shared by a member with a community. Stored in the community's repo. The record contains pre-resolved fields (url, source, author) so consumers can display the document without additional lookups.

documentCid.description: CID of the source record at time of sharing, for version pinning

sharedBy.description: DID of the member who shared the content

url.description: Pre-resolved web URL for the document (e.g. https://example.com/blog/my-post)

source.description: Platform or publication name where the document originates (e.g. 'leaflet', 'whtwnd')

author.description: DID of the original content creator (may differ from sharedBy)

path.description: URL path from the source record

sharedAt.description: When the document was shared with the community
